behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names coerceArgsToSchema, parseArgs.ts, callTool.ts, extras.tool?.function?.parameters, and describes all behavioral expectations tested.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what must happen (stringify objects/arrays for string-typed params) without giving exact code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behavior (stringify vs preserve) and import paths; any reasonable implementation matching the spec would pass.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the function via tsx subprocess and run vitest, not just string grep (though two tests do grep for presence).

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests check actual output types and values (e.g. isinstance str, exact JSON strings), a stub returning args unchanged would fail stringify tests.

behavior_in_tests.reason: All listed verification behaviors (object/array stringify, string/number/bool preservation, no mutation) have corresponding tests.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are individually named with docstrings describing each behavior.

no_typos.reason: Paths and function names are consistent between instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the files to modify but this is appropriate context, not line-level leakage.
